About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals two exceptional performers at the top of the momentum rankings. OCC dominates with a composite score of 96.8 (rank #1), posting extraordinary returns of 623.1% over one year while maintaining pristine technical structure—it trades above all four major moving averages and shows a "clean" momentum signal with extremely consistent ratio progression across timeframes (4 of 4 ratio passes). ADTTF ranks second with a 1-year return of 273.88% and similarly strong technical positioning, though its 6-month/3-month ratio of 1.09 suggests the acceleration has flattened compared to earlier periods. Both tickers demonstrate resilience versus major indices (OCC outperforms SPY by 601.66% over one year) and show minimal sector correlation concentration, with OCC's highest correlation at just 0.156 to XLK and ADTTF showing modest diversification. The standout pattern is OCC's extreme 1-month acceleration (50.86% return with an 8.61x ratio jump from weekly performance), indicating either a major catalytic event or potential liquidity-driven volatility that warrants scrutiny on position sizing.
